title: exacum ternifolium
intro: Exacum ternifolium, a flowering plant species in the gentian family, is native to the Himalayas and is often referred to as the 'Indian bugloss'. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Exacum ternifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
